introduction.description: Welcome to the admissions section. Here you will find all the necessary information to complete your application, along with key dates and resources to help you throughout the process.

eligibility: High school students with a minimum of 60% in science stream (or equivalent).
Undergraduate students holding a bachelor’s degree in a related field (for postgraduate programs).
Candidates must possess a valid passport for international admissions.
process: Submit application through the online portal.
Confirm admission by submitting required documents.
